title: Navigate back to the previous screen
test_steps: Click on the blue chevron button in the top left corner.
expected_result: The user should be navigated back to the previous screen.

title: Select a random animal face image
test_steps: Click on one of the animal face images in the 3x3 grid.
expected_result: The selected animal face image should be highlighted or marked as selected.

title: Select all animal face images
test_steps: Click on each animal face image in the 3x3 grid.
expected_result: All animal face images should be highlighted or marked as selected.

title: Select a non-existent animal face image
test_steps: Click on an area outside the 3x3 grid of animal face images.
expected_result: No animal face image should be selected.

title: Select multiple animal face images
test_steps: Click on two different animal face images in the 3x3 grid.
expected_result: The two selected animal face images should be highlighted or marked as selected.

title: Input text in the search bar
test_steps: Locate and click on the search bar at the top of the screen. | Enter text in the search bar.
expected_result: The search bar should accept text input.

title: Check accessibility of the screen
test_steps: Use screen reader to navigate through the screen.
expected_result: The screen should be accessible to users with visual impairments.

title: Check usability of the screen
test_steps: Attempt to navigate through the screen using only the keyboard.
expected_result: The screen should be usable with a keyboard.

title: Check data persistence
test_steps: Navigate away from the screen and back to it.
expected_result: The selected animal face images should still be highlighted or marked as selected.
